constraints: Every endpoint in this module must gate on role_key=admin before any handler logic executes; the 403 check is not optional and cannot be delegated to individual handler implementations

Template allowed_variables must be validated against the safe allowlist (patient_name, facility_name, payer_name, assessment_summary, coordinator_name) on create and update; any variable outside the allowlist returns 400
Admin-surfaces owns OutreachTemplate CRUD; outreach-module must never perform POST or PATCH on outreach_templates — it reads only via GET /api/v1/templates/outreach
Import monitoring endpoints are GET-only; no POST/PATCH/DELETE endpoints for ImportJob exist in this module; intake-module owns the full import lifecycle
All mutations (user create/update, template create/update, org settings update) must write AuditEvent rows via core-infrastructure insert-only pattern before returning 200/201
User deactivation must check that at least one other active admin exists in the organization before setting status=inactive; return 400 if this would leave the org with zero active admins
All queries must be scoped to request.state.organization_id; cross-org access to any resource returns 404 (not 403) to avoid information disclosure
Reference data endpoints (hospitals, decline-reasons, payers) are read-only in Phase 1; no admin UI for creating reference records via API
